source_text: Apixaban was superior to warfarin in preventing stroke or systemic embolism (1.27% vs 1.60% per year; HR 0.79; 95% CI, 0.66-0.95; P=0.01).
Dabigatran 150 mg was superior to warfarin for stroke prevention (1.11% vs 1.69% per year; HR 0.66; 95% CI, 0.53-0.82; P<0.001).
Rivaroxaban was noninferior to warfarin for stroke (1.7% vs 2.2% per year; HR 0.79; 95% CI, 0.66-0.96; P<0.001).
High-dose edoxaban was noninferior to warfarin for stroke (1.18% vs 1.50% per year; HR 0.79; 95% CI, 0.63-0.99; P<0.001).
